_instructions: Copy this file to your implementation repo as .governance-declaration.json and fill in all placeholder values for your system. Remove the _instructions, _field_docs, and _example keys before committing the live declaration. Pin every contract_pins entry to the version listed in contracts/standards-manifest.json at the time of filing. Advance last_evaluation_date whenever the evaluation harness is re-executed.

_field_docs.governance_declaration_version: Version of this declaration schema. Use '1.0.0' until a newer schema is published in spectrum-systems.
_field_docs.architecture_source: GitHub repo that owns the authoritative governance standards. Always 'nicklasorte/spectrum-systems'.
_field_docs.standards_manifest_version: The standards_version field from contracts/standards-manifest.json pinned at the time of this declaration (e.g. '2026.03.0').
_field_docs.system_id: Canonical identifier from docs/system-status-registry.md or SYSTEMS.md (e.g. 'SYS-001').
_field_docs.implementation_repo: GitHub repo slug for this implementation (e.g. 'owner/repo').
_field_docs.declared_at: ISO 8601 date this declaration was filed or last updated (YYYY-MM-DD).
_field_docs.contract_pins: Map of artifact_type to schema_version for every contract this system consumes. Keys must match artifact_type values in contracts/standards-manifest.json.
_field_docs.schema_pins: Map of schema file path (relative to spectrum-systems root) to schema_version for every schema this system imports. Paths must resolve in the architecture_source repo.
_field_docs.rule_version: Version identifier for the rule pack imported from rules/. Use null if no rule pack applies.
_field_docs.prompt_set_hash: SHA-256 of the prompt files in prompts/ that this system depends on, or null if prompts are not versioned.
_field_docs.evaluation_manifest_path: Repo-relative path to the evaluation manifest or README that describes the evaluation harness for this system.
_field_docs.last_evaluation_date: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the most recent evaluation harness execution with recorded pass/fail results.
_field_docs.external_storage_policy: Free-text description of how external artifacts (inputs, outputs) are stored and accessed at runtime. Use 'none' if all data resides in the repo.

_example.description: Completed declaration for SYS-001 (comment-resolution-engine) pinned to standards manifest version 2026.03.0.
_example.external_storage_policy: Working paper PDFs and comment spreadsheets are ingested at runtime from external sources; no operational artifacts are stored in the implementation repo

evaluation_manifest_path: <relative path to eval manifest or eval/README>
